songRequest.title: SongRequest
songRequest.description: Represents a song requested by a user for the Random Play Dance event.

id.description: The unique ID of the request

creatorId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the requesting user

creatorName.description: The display name of the requesting user

creatorEmail.description: The email of the requesting user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the request was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was last updated

status.description: The verification/operation status of the song request

votesCount.description: The total number of upvotes for this song request

dancePart.description: The requested choreo or dance section

youtubeUrl.description: An optional Youtube reference video URL

eventId.description: The event ID this request belongs to

voters.description: An array of maps representing details of users who upvoted

vote.title: Vote
vote.description: A vote recorded by a specific user for a specific song request.

voterId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user who voted

voterName.description: The display name of the user who voted

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the vote was cast

danceEvent.title: DanceEvent
danceEvent.description: Represents a dance play space event scheduled by organizers.

instagramUrl.description: Optional social media poster URL link

activeEventSetting.title: ActiveEventSetting
activeEventSetting.description: System config settings that define the active event.

isRequestPhaseLocked.description: Whether the song requests / voting is locked

/songRequests/{requestId}.description: The primary collection of requested songs.

/songRequests/{requestId}/votes/{userId}.description: A subcollection ensuring one-vote-per-user per song request.

/danceEvents/{eventId}.description: All scheduled / historical random play dance events.
